calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-27-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Department 501 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Andrew Stewart.
Dept: 514. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Edward C. Singer, Esq. appeared for plaintiff 1320-1380 Lombard I1A, LLC.
Jessica Castorena, Reginal Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Andrew Stewart.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Unlawful Detainer was filed on December 17, 2019.
Defendant Andrew Stewart filed his answer to the complaint on December 24, 2019.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on January, 9, 2020, setting trial for today, January 27, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, January 27, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff 1320-1380 Lombard I1A, LLC, and against defendant Andrew Stewart, as follows:

Holdover Damages - $4,366.50.
Costs - $2,179.75.

Total - $6,546.25.

Additionally, plaintiff is entitled to Restitution & Possession of the premises located at 1340 Lombard Street, #304, San Francisco, CA 94109.

The lease is forfeited.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-27-2020 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: N. Wong; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff 1320-1380 Lombard is present. Represented by Jessica Castonera.
Attorney Edward Singer appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Andrew Stewart is present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of January 27, 2020 remains on calendar.
